actors: all actors to be shown in dialog from left to right
template_scene_name.text:
This is the text that will be displayed.
[character] Will say this line.
[character:angry]Will have this emotion.
If there's no 
 at the end of a sentence there will be no pause.
template_scene_name.prompt: This is the text that will be shown when the options are done.

todo.text:
[host:annoyed]Oh.
Oh boy.
[host]This is embarassing.
You've reached a TODO item in the script that was never removed and never compeleted.
Sorry about that.  What would you like me to do?
todo.prompt: 'What would you like me to do?'

greet.text:
[host:annoyed]Welcome to the Hesiod Shelter for Wayward Chimeras.
[host]Oh. Are you here to volunteer?

explanation.text:
[host]I select a creature from the play area.  I give it to you.  You put it in a pen.
Then we switch: you pick a creature, give it to me, and I put it in a pen.
Repeat until all animals are housed, then we're done.

explanation_warning.text:
[host]One last thing: Make sure that no animals with the same trait line up in a row, column, or diagonal. If that happens it will cause a resonance cascade or whatever.
Got it?

explain_again.text:
[host:annoyed]That's fine.
It's fine.
Here: let me try saying exactly the same thing over again.

cascade_okay.text: [host]Alright. No more time to waste.  Let's get these critters into their homes.

farther_apart.text: [host]That sounds to me like a useless precaution.

thinly_veiled.text: [host]I don't know what you mean.  C'mon now.  Let's get these critters sheltered.

but_the_cascade.text:
[host]Hey, did you know shutting up is free!
Let's get these animals sheltered.
